policy.selectionRule: Use the canonical selector to choose the next bounded operator-simplicity slice from the lowest priority rank with satisfied dependencies and pending state.
policy.syncRule: Update slice state only when repo truth materially changes. Completed means the simplification is already real in code/docs/logs/checks.

items.title: Rename the non-authoritative workdirs surface to scratch and remove the obsolete CLAUDE completion roadmap draft
items.selectionHint: Completed anchor slice: the old non-authoritative workdir surface was renamed and the obsolete roadmap draft removed.

items.title: Add one operator start surface and clarify truth-vs-history boundaries
items.selectionHint: Completed anchor slice: one shortest operator map now exists and authority boundaries are explicit.

items.title: Clarify runtime/follow-up as a mixed support corpus rather than the canonical live-head selector
items.selectionHint: Completed anchor slice: operators are told to resolve live continuation through the canonical shared resolver instead of follow-up folder recency.

items.title: Clarify knowledge versus sources ownership in the operator-facing start surface
items.selectionHint: Completed anchor slice: operators can now distinguish Directive-owned doctrine from raw upstream inputs quickly.

items.title: Group the runtime follow-up checker trio under one scripts family
items.selectionHint: Completed anchor slice: the first checker family moved into a grouped folder without changing operator commands.

items.title: Audit direct checker and package references that currently block the first runtime/follow-up archive move
proofCommands: rg -n "runtime/00-follow-up/" scripts package.json shared control runtime -g '!node_modules'
items.selectionHint: Completed audit slice: active Runtime and checker references still block broad archive moves, but one exact reference-free candidate is now proven safe for the first bounded archive move.

items.title: Move the first verified superseded runtime/follow-up support bundle into archive without breaking direct references
items.selectionHint: Completed anchor slice: the first archive move relocated only the verified reference-free Hermes cutover note and left all directly referenced bundles in place.

items.title: Audit the next safe checker-family grouping candidate under scripts/
items.selectionHint: Completed audit slice: the `openclaw` checker trio is the next safe grouping candidate because only package.json references the exact script paths and the family has no sibling-script coupling.

items.title: Move one additional audited checker family into a grouped scripts subfolder
items.selectionHint: Completed anchor slice: the `openclaw` checker trio now lives under one grouped scripts folder and the npm command surface stayed stable.

items.title: Audit one additional dead-surface cleanup candidate with repo-local references only
items.selectionHint: Completed anchor slice: active Discovery front-door coverage docs now point to the repo-native analysis surface instead of a dead Mission Control checker command.
